message:
fix: align transaction SearchIssues filter support with store-level (bd-v6v8)

doltTransaction.SearchIssues previously only supported 5 filter fields
(query, ParentID, Status, SpecIDPrefix, SourceRepo), while the store-level
DoltStore.SearchIssues supported ~30 fields. This meant callers using
RunInTransaction with complex filters would silently get unfiltered results.

Add all missing filter fields: text searches (TitleSearch, TitleContains,
DescriptionContains, NotesContains), status exclusion, type filtering,
priority ranges, assignee, date ranges, labels (AND/OR), IDs, IDPrefix,
ephemeral, pinned, template, NoParent, MolType, WispType, scheduling
filters (Deferred, Overdue, ClosedAfter/Before, DeferAfter/Before,
DueAfter/Before), metadata queries, empty/null checks, and Limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/agate
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
